items.title: Exercising the team option for Micah Potter was an easy call for the Pacers — and mostly a formality.
items.author: Scott Agness
items.body_excerpt:
Exercising the team option for Micah Potter was an easy call for the Pacers — and mostly a formality.

His contract is non-guaranteed, preserving flexibility. It doesn’t become guaranteed until Jan. 10, giving the FO time (and an option) to solidify its backup center plan.

items.title: The Pacers will exercise the team option on Micah Potter’s fully non-guaranteed contract for the 2026-27 season, multiple league source told me.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt: The Pacers will exercise the team option on Micah Potter’s fully non-guaranteed contract for the 2026-27 season, multiple league source told me.

items.title: The Indiana Pacers plan to exercise the $2.80 million team option on Micah Potter, which is fully non-guaranteed for the 2026-27 season and have extended a two-way qualifying offer to Jalen Slawson, league sources told @hoopshypeofficial.bsky.social.
